title: AgentOS RC final hardening
blocker: GitHub has no eligible independent reviewer for PR #11; only the PR author is listed as collaborator, so formal APPROVE review cannot be recorded without adding a reviewer.

tasks.title: Enforce final release-candidate gates
tasks.blocker: PR #11 has green CI but remains REVIEW_REQUIRED/BLOCKED because no eligible independent reviewer is available.
tasks.goal: Mechanically connect SpecPilot declared scope, Git diff validation, harness discovery, secret scanning, review evidence and release governance.

agentGoal.draft: /goal Close AgentOS RC final hardening with edit-scope, harness discovery, secret scanner and governance gates verified before release.
agentGoal.outcome: The RC branch cannot pass validation when real changes exceed declared sprint scope, harness JSON is missed, secrets evade scanner, or release governance is incomplete.
agentGoal.verificationSurface: npm audit, npm run doctor, npm run validate, npm test, git diff --check, GitHub PR checks and review state
constraints: Do not add medium or long-term AgentOS runtime features.
Do not use administrative merge bypass for this sprint.
agentGoal.iterationPolicy: Write failing regression tests before implementation and keep each gate mechanically verifiable.
agentGoal.blockedStopCondition: Stop if GitHub cannot provide an eligible APPROVE review without administrative bypass.

acceptanceCriteria: Git diff scope validation rejects undeclared files and action mismatches.
Harness JSON discovery validates templates, active sprints and archive files without package hardcoding.
Secret scanning detects special-character and structured secret assignments while redacting values.
Review and release docs reflect current governance, CI and blocked-release rules.
Formal review is required before merge, tag or prerelease.

evidence.criterion: Git diff scope validation rejects undeclared files and action mismatches.
evidence.result: Local validate passed with edit-scope enforcement over 21 changed path records.

evidence.criterion: Harness JSON discovery validates templates, active sprints and archive files without package hardcoding.
evidence.result: validate:templates discovered and validated 11 harness JSON files.

evidence.criterion: Secret scanning detects special-character and structured secret assignments while redacting values.
evidence.result: 38 tests passed, including structured secret assignment and redaction coverage.

evidence.criterion: Review and release docs reflect current governance, CI and blocked-release rules.
evidence.result: Checklist, Ubuntu and Windows checks passed on PR #11 before the governance evidence update.

evidence.criterion: Formal review is required before merge, tag or prerelease.
evidence.result: GitHub reports REVIEW_REQUIRED and BLOCKED; issue #12 tracks the missing eligible reviewer.
